IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (48037995.pdf)
SUMMARY: Patient and professional excellence oriented Pharmacist with nine years of retail experience providing outstanding pharmacy services. Strong background in science and clinical pharmacology with excellent interpersonal skills.
SKILLS: Integrity and Honesty, Compassion and Courtesy, Excellent Interpersonal Skills, High Level of Analytical and Cognitive Skills, Self-Disciplined and Self-Motivated
